title: Secure Windows distribution
highlights: Adds prebuilt x86_64 and ARM64 Windows release support with DigiCert Authenticode signing backed by a non-exportable Google Cloud HSM key
improvements: Keeps all Google signing credentials outside the public GitHub repository while providing one-command private certificate setup and release signing
Publishes signed Windows executables, archives, and updated SHA-256 checksums for direct installation
fixes: Release binaries now preserve the complete Daanio prerelease version so installers can verify tags such as v0.1.0-daanio.2 correctly
